channel.title: TT-RSS Automation Test Feed
channel.description: Local test feed for UI automation — served by Python app static files.

item.title: Python RSS Migration: Architecture Overview
item.description:
This article covers the architecture of migrating a PHP RSS aggregator to Python Flask. The migration involved 31 database models, a REST API with 17 operations, and a Celery background task system replacing the PHP daemon.

Key decisions included using SQLAlchemy for ORM, argon2id for password hashing, and pluggy for the plugin system.
item.author: Tech Team

item.title: Flask Backend: REST API Design Patterns
item.description:
Designing a clean REST API in Flask requires careful attention to response envelopes, error handling, and authentication guards. The TT-RSS API protocol specifies a JSON envelope with seq, status, and content fields.

All 17 API operations are tested with both unit tests (mocked DB) and integration tests (real PostgreSQL).
item.author: Backend Team

item.title: Playwright UI Automation: End-to-End Testing Strategy
item.description:
Playwright has become the leading tool for browser automation in 2025. Key advantages over Selenium include parallel execution, auto-waiting, and built-in network interception.

For RSS reader applications, the critical test flows are: feed navigation, article reading, mark-as-read, starring, and subscription management.
item.author: QA Team
